prompt:
Ultra-realistic full-body studio fashion portrait. Elegant young adult East Asian female, minimalist studio, from head to floor, three-quarter back view. Slightly to the right—generous smooth negative space on the left and above the head. Body angled away from the camera toward the right; head looking back over the left shoulder, looking directly at the camera. Dignified, calm, understated confident expression—lips relaxed, soft photographic gaze.

Character: Slender and elegant figure, warm light-to-medium skin tone, delicate features, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, soft brow shape, small refined nose bridge, natural rose-red lip color. Exquisite understated makeup: glowing skin, light blush, gentle cheekbone contouring, fine eyeliner, neutral eye shadow, soft lip color. Real skin texture, fine pores, natural shoulder blades, spinal contour, gentle highlights on the back.

Hairstyle: Dark brown-black hair pulled into a loose, slightly messy low bun. Stray strands around the temples, cheeks, neck, and crown. A few fine flyaway strands catching strong backlighting—forming a delicate glowing rim light halo on the top and right side. Elegant but intentionally not rigid, not a perfectly neat hairstyle.

Dress: Floor-length haute couture evening gown—ultra-low backless design, very thin spaghetti straps, with almost the entire back exposed nearly to the lower waist. Fabric gathers at the upper hips and lower back into a soft draped cowl shape. The dress fits the waist and hips before falling into a long, narrow flowing column to the floor. The hem pools softly around the feet, with a small train extending toward the bottom-left and bottom-right corners.

Marble Print: Exquisite natural marble pattern—flowing organic swirls. Tones: ivory white, warm beige, sand, caramel, taupe, smoky gray, charcoal, understated brown, and occasional near-black veining. Similar to polished travertine, onyx, or flowing stone, with longitudinal veins naturally wrapping along the body. Upper hips and waist feature lighter cream and tan marble veining; lower skirt has deeper brown and charcoal flows; dramatic dark stone-like textures near the hem. Fabric is smooth, lightweight, slightly glossy, with realistic tension, drape, folds, and specular highlights.

Arms and Accessories: Left arm gently crosses the front of the upper body—left hand resting on the right shoulder, fingers relaxed and elegant, natural light nude nails, anatomically accurate joints. Right arm slightly curved hanging at the side, hand relaxed near the outer thigh. A very thin, low-key gold bracelet on the right wrist. No heavy jewelry, necklaces, earrings, or distracting accessories.

Background: Seamless warm gray studio backdrop—a smooth gradient from medium warm gray at the top to a brighter off-white near the floor. Floor and wall blend seamlessly with no visible horizon. No equipment, no props, no cluttered elements.

Lighting: Bright diffused light source from behind the model slightly to the right—glowing halos on hair, right shoulder, arms, waist, and right edge of the gown. Large soft frontal fill light from the top left to present face and dress details while preserving dimensional shadows. Clear rim light, soft facial contouring, warm skin glow, gentle highlights on shoulder blades, smooth shadow transitions. A long strip of soft-edged gray shadow casts diagonally to the bottom left corner.

Camera: Full-frame 85mm, medium depth of field—woman and the entire dress are sharp and clear, background completely smooth. Natural and flattering perspective, minimal distortion. Accurate proportions, realistic hands, fine fabric rendering, individual hair strands, fine marble texture. Luxurious haute couture editorial, elegant and restrained, refined neutral color palette, high dynamic range, slight film softening.

Negative: No text, no logo, no watermark, no furniture, no props, no background objects, no extra people, no excessive jewelry, no deformed bodies, no extra fingers, no duplicate limbs, no plastic skin, no cropped heads, no cropped skirts.

promptZh:
超写实全身工作室时尚人像。优雅的东亚年轻女性，极简工作室背景，从头到脚，四分之三背影。身体略微向右——左侧及头顶留有充足的平滑负空间。身体背对镜头向右倾斜；头部越过左肩回望，直视镜头。端庄、冷静、内敛且自信的表情——双唇放松，眼神柔和。

人物：身材苗条优雅，暖色调中等肤色，五官精致，杏仁状深棕色眼睛，眉形柔和，鼻梁小巧精致，自然的玫瑰红唇色。精致内敛的妆容：光泽感肌肤，淡腮红，柔和的颧骨轮廓，细眼线，中性眼影，柔和唇色。真实的皮肤质感，细致的毛孔，自然的肩胛骨，脊柱轮廓，背部有柔和的高光。

发型：深棕黑色头发盘成一个松散、略显凌乱的低发髻。鬓角、脸颊、颈部和头顶有零星发丝。几缕细小的碎发在强烈的逆光下捕捉光线——在头顶和右侧形成精致的轮廓光光晕。优雅但刻意不显僵硬，并非完美整齐的发型。

礼服：拖地高级定制晚礼服——超低露背设计，极细吊带，几乎整个背部裸露至腰部下方。面料在上臀部和后腰处聚拢，形成柔和的垂坠褶皱。礼服贴合腰部和臀部，随后呈长而窄的修身长裙垂至地面。裙摆在脚边柔和地堆叠，裙尾向左下角和右下角延伸。

大理石纹：精致的天然大理石纹理——流动的有机漩涡。色调：象牙白、暖米色、沙色、焦糖色、灰褐色、烟灰色、炭灰色、内敛的棕色，以及偶尔出现的近黑色纹理。类似于抛光洞石、缟玛瑙或流动的岩石，纵向纹理自然地包裹着身体。上臀部和腰部呈现较浅的奶油色和棕褐色大理石纹；下裙摆有更深沉的棕色和炭灰色流动感；裙摆处有戏剧性的深色石材纹理。面料光滑、轻盈、略带光泽，具有真实的张力、垂坠感、褶皱和镜面高光。

手臂与配饰：左臂轻轻交叉于上身前方——左手搭在右肩上，手指放松且优雅，自然的裸色指甲，关节解剖结构准确。右臂自然下垂于身体一侧，手部在右大腿外侧放松。右腕佩戴一条极细、低调的金色手链。无厚重的珠宝、项链、耳环或其他分散注意力的配饰。

背景：无缝暖灰色工作室背景——从顶部的中性暖灰色到靠近地面处更明亮的灰白色，呈现平滑的渐变。地面与墙面无缝衔接，无可见的地平线。无设备、无道具、无杂乱元素。

布光：明亮的漫射光源来自模特后方略微偏右的位置——发丝、右肩、手臂、腰部和礼服右边缘呈现发光光晕。左上方有大型柔和的正面补光，以呈现面部和礼服细节，同时保留立体阴影。清晰的轮廓光，柔和的面部轮廓，温暖的肤色光泽，肩胛骨处有柔和的高光，阴影过渡平滑。一条边缘柔和的灰色长条阴影斜向投射至左下角。

相机：全画幅 85mm 镜头，中等景深——人物和整件礼服清晰锐利，背景完全虚化。视角自然且修饰身形，畸变极小。比例准确，手部真实，面料渲染细腻，发丝清晰，大理石纹理精细。奢华高级定制时尚大片，优雅克制，中性色调精炼，高动态范围，轻微的胶片柔化效果。

负面提示词：无文字，无标志，无水印，无家具，无道具，无背景杂物，无额外人物，无夸张珠宝，无畸形身体，无多余手指，无重复肢体，无塑料感皮肤，无头部裁剪，无裙摆裁剪。
